'''bachoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiucai|xiucai]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiucai|xiucai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bachoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæcheteth|bæcheteth]] || [[word:bæchetej|bæchetej]] || [[word:bæchetesh|bæchetesh]] || [[word:bæchete|bæchete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bachochototh|bachochototh]] || [[word:bachochotoj|bachochotoj]] || [[word:bachochotosh|bachochotosh]] || [[word:bachochoto|bachochoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bachototh|bachototh]] || [[word:bachotoj|bachotoj]] || [[word:bachotosh|bachotosh]] || [[word:bachoto|bachoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bachoftoth|bachoftoth]] || [[word:bachoftoj|bachoftoj]] || [[word:bachoftosh|bachoftosh]] || [[word:bachoftof|bachoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bachototho|bachototho]] || [[word:bachotojo|bachotojo]] || [[word:bachotosho|bachotosho]] || [[word:bachotoko|bachotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bachototh|bachototh]] || [[word:bachotoj|bachotoj]] || [[word:bachotosh|bachotosh]] || [[word:bachoto|bachoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bachotothol|bachotothol]] || [[word:bachotojol|bachotojol]] || [[word:bachotoshol|bachotoshol]] || [[word:bachotokol|bachotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bachotothotho|bachotothotho]] || [[word:bachotojojo|bachotojojo]] || [[word:bachotoshosho|bachotoshosho]] || [[word:bachotoko|bachotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bachotothon|bachotothon]] || [[word:bachotojon|bachotojon]] || [[word:bachotoshon|bachotoshon]] || [[word:bachotokon|bachotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bachotothoro|bachotothoro]] || [[word:bachotojoro|bachotojoro]] || [[word:bachotoshoro|bachotoshoro]] || [[word:bachotokoro|bachotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
